chapter_title.ar: باب خَلْقِ أَبْدَانِ الْأَئِمَّةِ وَ أَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَ قُلُوبِهِمْ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 94 – The Creation of the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, and their spirits and their<sup>asws</sup> hearts

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ لِلَّهِ نَهَراً دُونَ عَرْشِهِ وَ دُونَ النَّهَرِ الَّذِي دُونَ عَرْشِهِ نُورٌ نَوَّرَهُ وَ إِنَّ فِي حَافَتَيِ النَّهَرِ رُوحَيْنِ مَخْلُوقَيْنِ رُوحُ الْقُدُسِ وَ رُوحٌ مِنْ أَمْرِهِ وَ إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عَشْرَ طِينَاتٍ خَمْسَةً مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ وَ خَمْسَةً مِنَ الْأَرْضِ فَفَسَّرَ الْجِنَانَ وَ فَسَّرَ الْأَرْضَ
ثُمَّ قَالَ مَا مِنْ نَبِيٍّ وَ لَا مَلَكٍ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ جَبَلَهُ إِلَّا نَفَخَ فِيهِ مِنْ إِحْدَى الرُّوحَيْنِ وَ جَعَلَ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مِنْ إِحْدَى الطِّينَتَيْنِ

قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا الْجَبْلُ فَقَالَ الْخَلْقُ غَيْرَنَا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ خَلَقَنَا مِنَ الْعَشْرِ طِينَاتٍ وَ نَفَخَ فِينَا مِنَ الرُّوحَيْنِ جَمِيعاً فَأَطْيِبْ بِهَا طِيباً

وَ رَوَى غَيْرُهُ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّامِتِ قَالَ طِينُ الْجِنَانِ جَنَّةُ عَدْنٍ وَ جَنَّةُ الْمَأْوَى وَ جَنَّةُ النَّعِيمِ وَ الْفِرْدَوْسُ وَ الْخُلْدُ وَ طِينُ الْأَرْضِ مَكَّةُ وَ الْمَدِينَةُ وَ الْكُوفَةُ وَ بَيْتُ الْمَقْدِسِ وَ الْحَائِرُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ali Bin Hassan and Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, and someone else, from Ali Bin Hassan, from Ali Bin Atiyya, from Ali Bin Raib,

raising it to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For Allah<sup>azwj</sup> there is a river below His<sup>azwj</sup> Throne, and below the river which is below His<sup>azwj</sup> Throne is a Light of His<sup>azwj</sup> Light, and in the two banks of the river are two created spirits – the Holy Spirit and a Spirit of His<sup>azwj</sup> Command; and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has (therein) ten clays, five from the Paradise and five from the earth’. So he<sup>asws</sup> explained the gardens and explained the earth.

Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is none from a Prophet<sup>as</sup> nor an Angel kneaded from after it except that in his is one of the two spirits, and Made the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> to be from one of the two clays’.

I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> the 1<sup style="font-weight: normal">st</sup>, ‘What is the kneading?’ So he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘The creation of others than us<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> the People<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> of the Household, for Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Created us from the ten clays and Blew the Spirit into us from both the spirits together. Thus, He<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Aromatised the aroma with it’.

And others reported from Abu Al-Samit that he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘The clay of the Gardens is the Garden of Everlasting Bliss, and the Garden of Shelter, and Al-Firdow, and Al-Khuld, and the clay of the earth is Makkah, and Al-Medina, and Al-Kufa, and Bayt Al-Maqdis, and Al-Ha’ir’ (area around the Holy grave of Imam Hussain<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>).
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Ali ibn Hassa’n and Muhammad ibn Yahya from Salma ibn al-Khattab and others from Ali ibn Hassa’n from Ali ibn ‘Atiyya from Ali ibn Ri’ab who has narrated it in a marfu‘ manner from Amir al-Mu’minin (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah has a canal below His Throne. Below the canal that is below His Throne is a light that has lighted it up. On both rims of the canal there are two created spirits. One is the holy Spirit and the other is the Spirit from His command. Allah has ten (kinds) of clay. Five from paradise and five from earth.” He then explained the earth and the Paradise. Then he said, “There is no prophet or angel that He has formed (Jabala) but that He has blown into them from one of those spirits. He has formed the Prophet (s.a) from one of those clays.” The narrator has said, “I asked abu al-Hassan the 1st , “What is Jabala?” He said, “It is the creatures exclusive of us Ahl al-Bayt (family of Prophet Muhammad). Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious, has created us from ten clays and has into us from both the Spirits and has added fragrance to fragrance.”
